title: draba verna var. serrata
intro: Draba verna var. serrata, also known as Alpine Whitlow Grass or Serrate Whitlow Grass, is a rare, perennial plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat skin irritations, wounds, and eczema due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like calcium and iron, providing various health benefits such as antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory effects. Traditionally, Draba verna var. serrata is used in herbal preparations like infusions, salves, and ointments to soothe skin issues and promote wound healing.
